# VentureInKorea Embed Widget

> Korea startup ecosystem. Embeddable widgets for any website. Zero dependencies, Shadow DOM isolation.

## Quick Start

```html
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/ventureinkorea-embed@1/dist/embed.min.js"></script>
<div data-ventureinkorea="entity" data-slug="example"></div>
```

## Available Widget Types (4)

- entity: `data-ventureinkorea="entity"`
- glossary: `data-ventureinkorea="glossary"`
- guide: `data-ventureinkorea="guide"`
- search: `data-ventureinkorea="search"`

## Customization

- **Themes**: light, dark, sepia, auto (follows system preference)
- **Sizes**: compact (280px), default (420px), large (720px)
- **Styles**: modern, classic

```html
<div data-ventureinkorea="entity" data-slug="example"
     data-theme="auto" data-size="compact" data-style-variant="modern"></div>
```

## Integration Methods

1. **Script tag** (recommended): `<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/ventureinkorea-embed@1/dist/embed.min.js"></script>`
2. **iframe**: `https://ventureinkorea.com/iframe/entity/{slug}/`
3. **oEmbed**: `https://ventureinkorea.com/oembed?url={page_url}&format=json`
4. **Badge**: `https://ventureinkorea.com/badge/site.svg`

## Links

- Main site: https://ventureinkorea.com
- Widget docs: https://widget.ventureinkorea.com
- API documentation: https://ventureinkorea.com/developers/
- npm package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/ventureinkorea-embed
- GitHub: https://github.com/fyipedia/ventureinkorea-embed
